positive: A stylized geometric mandala featuring cosmic elements. The centerpiece is a large, symmetrical celestial body composed of interconnected lines and abstract planetary orbits. Surrounding it are stylized flora motifs (leaves, vines) rendered with sharp, clean edges, integrated into the mandalic pattern. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep midnight blues, electric teal, metallic gold, and stark white. The composition must be perfectly radial, suitable for a central placement on apparel. Minimalist yet detailed, with strong black outlines to ensure print visibility. Vector illustration style, suitable for screen printing.
negative: blurry, messy, photorealism, logo, text, watermark, signature, debris, noise, grain, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, asymmetry
